original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph, seemingly a night or low-light exposure. The image is predominantly dark. A distinct, faint horizontal line composed of small, discrete points of light or dashes crosses the center of the frame. Above this line, slightly to the left of the center, is a single, brighter, elongated point of light. There are a few other very faint specks in the frame.

elements.description: A black-and-white photograph mounted on a white-bordered card. The image is predominantly black with a faint horizontal dashed white line across the center. There is one small, faint white dot near the center of the dashed line. Handwritten text 'FIGHT PATH' with an arrow pointing right is visible on the left white border. Handwritten text 'see 130' is visible on the bottom white border.

judge.reason: Description B invents specific handwritten text ('FIGHT PATH', 'see 130') on a white border that is not mentioned in Description A, creating a direct contradiction about the presence and content of these visual elements.
